You said: i want to make a POS for my cafe
To make a Point of Sale (POS) system for your cafe, you can either build a custom app using a software stack or assemble a hardware and software system using an existing retail platform. Building from scratch gives you total control over features, while utilizing existing platforms provides immediate reliability and security compliance. 
Development Roadmap (If Building From Scratch) 
[Database Setup] ──> [Backend API] ──> [Frontend Interface] ──> [Payment Gateway Integration]
  1. Choose Your Software Stack
    • Frontend (UI): Use React or Vue.js for web browsers, or Flutter / React Native if you want a dedicated tablet app.
    • Backend (API): Use Node.js (Express), Python (FastAPI), or Go to handle calculations, orders, and inventory logging.
    • Database: Use PostgreSQL or MongoDB to store menu items, transactions, user roles, and daily sales metrics. 
  2. Design the Core Database Schema
    • Products Table: Columns for item_id, name, price, category_id, and inventory_count.
    • Orders Table: Columns for order_id, timestamp, total_amount, payment_method, and status (e.g., pending, completed).
    • Order_Items Table: Columns for order_id, item_id, quantity, and subtotal to track specific items in each ticket. 
  3. Develop Essential Cafe Features
    • Modifications Manager: Allow baristas to easily add milk alternatives, espresso shots, or sweetness levels to an item.
    • Split Payments: Implement logic to divide a single ticket bill among multiple customers or payment types.
    • Real-time Inventory Tracking: Automatically subtract beans, milk cartons, or pastries from your stock levels as orders finish. 
  4. Integrate Secure Payment Gateways
    • Online APIs: Use platforms like Stripe or PayPal to process credit card numbers and digital wallets safely.
    • Hardware Readers: Integrate specific terminal SDKs (like Stripe Terminal) to send totals directly to a physical card reader. 
Low-Code/Ready-Made Hardware Route (Faster Launch) 
If you need a system running immediately, configuring existing hardware with a robust cloud POS service saves months of programming. 
  • Core Hardware Components:
    • Tablet: An Apple iPad or Android Tablet serves as your main cashier and customer-facing terminal.
    • Receipt Printer: A thermal printer with Bluetooth or Ethernet connectivity (e.g., Star Micronics).
    • Cash Drawer: A standard heavy-duty metal cash drawer that connects to your receipt printer via an RJ11 cable. 
  • Top Cafe POS Software:
    • Square for Restaurants: Highly popular for cafes due to its intuitive layout, built-in payment processing, and free baseline tier.
    • Lightspeed Restaurant: Exceptional for deep inventory tracking, ingredient-level monitoring, and multi-location management.
    • Toast POS: An all-in-one Android-based ecosystem built specifically for food service, kitchen displays, and tableside ordering. 
Would you prefer guidance on writing the code and database schema for a custom build, or do you want help choosing and budgeting ready-made hardware?

You said: just pure vibe coding
Let's build a clean, minimalist cafe POS right now using HTML, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript.
Copy this code, save it as index.html, and double-click it to run your cafe cash register directly in your browser.
html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>☕ Cafe Vibe POS</title>
  <script src="https://tailwindcss.com"></script>
</head>
<body class="bg-stone-100 text-stone-800 font-sans h-screen flex flex-col">

  <!-- Header -->
  <header class="bg-stone-900 text-stone-100 p-4 shadow-md flex justify-between items-center">
    <h1 class="text-xl font-bold tracking-wide">☕ VIBE CAFE POS</h1>
    <div id="live-clock" class="text-sm font-mono opacity-80"></div>
  </header>

  <!-- Main POS Workspace -->
  <main class="flex-1 flex overflow-hidden">
    
    <!-- Left Side: Menu Grid -->
    <section class="w-2/3 p-6 overflow-y-auto">
      <div class="mb-6 flex gap-2">
        <button onclick="filterMenu('all')" class="px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-stone-900 text-white text-sm font-medium">All</button>
        <button onclick="filterMenu('coffee')" class="px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-stone-300 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-stone-200">Coffee</button>
        <button onclick="filterMenu('tea')" class="px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-stone-300 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-stone-200">Tea & Matcha</button>
        <button onclick="filterMenu('pastry')" class="px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-white border border-stone-300 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-stone-200">Pastries</button>
      </div>

      <div id="menu-grid" class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        <!-- JS injects menu items here -->
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Right Side: Current Ticket / Cart -->
    <section class="w-1/3 bg-white border-l border-stone-200 flex flex-col justify-between shadow-xl">
      <!-- Ticket Header -->
      <div class="p-4 border-b border-stone-100">
        <h2 class="font-bold text-lg flex justify-between">
          <span>Current Ticket</span>
          <span id="ticket-number" class="text-stone-400 font-mono text-sm self-center">#0001</span>
        </h2>
      </div>

      <!-- Ticket Items List -->
      <div id="ticket-items" class="flex-1 p-4 overflow-y-auto space-y-3">
        <!-- JS injects cart items here -->
      </div>

      <!-- Financial Totals & Checkout -->
      <div class="p-4 border-t border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 space-y-4">
        <div class="space-y-1.5 text-sm font-medium text-stone-600">
          <div class="flex justify-between">
            <span>Subtotal</span>
            <span id="subtotal">$0.00</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex justify-between">
            <span>Tax (12%)</span>
            <span id="tax">$0.00</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex justify-between text-base font-bold text-stone-900 pt-1 border-t border-stone-200">
            <span>Total</span>
            <span id="total">$0.00</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
          <button onclick="clearTicket()" class="py-3 bg-stone-200 text-stone-700 rounded-xl font-medium hover:bg-stone-300 transition-colors">Void</button>
          <button onclick="checkout()" class="py-3 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-xl font-bold hover:bg-emerald-700 shadow-md transition-all">Pay Cash</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  </main>

  <script>
    // App State & Menu Data
    const MENU = [
      { id: 1, name: 'Espresso', price: 3.50, cat: 'coffee', color: 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300' },
      { id: 2, name: 'Americano', price: 4.00, cat: 'coffee', color: 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300' },
      { id: 3, name: 'Latte', price: 4.75, cat: 'coffee', color: 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300' },
      { id: 4, name: 'Flat White', price: 4.50, cat: 'coffee', color: 'bg-amber-100 border-amber-300' },
      { id: 5, name: 'Matcha Latte', price: 5.20, cat: 'tea', color: 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200' },
      { id: 6, name: 'Iced Peach Tea', price: 4.25, cat: 'tea', color: 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200' },
      { id: 7, name: 'Butter Croissant', price: 3.75, cat: 'pastry', color: 'bg-orange-50 border-orange-200' },
      { id: 8, name: 'Almond Croissant', price: 4.50, cat: 'pastry', color: 'bg-orange-50 border-orange-200' },
      { id: 9, name: 'Chocolate Brownie', price: 3.00, cat: 'pastry', color: 'bg-orange-50 border-orange-200' }
    ];

    let ticket = [];
    let orderCounter = 1;

    // Render Menu Items
    function renderMenu(items) {
      const grid = document.getElementById('menu-grid');
      grid.innerHTML = items.map(item => `
        <button onclick="addToTicket(${item.id})" class="${item.color} border p-5 rounded-2xl text-left flex flex-col justify-between h-28 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:scale-95 transition-all">
          <span class="font-bold text-stone-900 block leading-tight">${item.name}</span>
          <span class="font-mono text-sm font-semibold text-stone-600">$${item.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
        </button>
      `).join('');
    }

    // Filter Menu Tabs
    function filterMenu(category) {
      const filtered = category === 'all' ? MENU : MENU.filter(i => i.cat === category);
      renderMenu(filtered);
    }

    // Add Item to Bill
    function addToTicket(id) {
      const item = MENU.find(i => i.id === id);
      const existing = ticket.find(i => i.id === id);

      if (existing) {
        existing.qty++;
      } else {
        ticket.push({ ...item, qty: 1 });
      }
      updatePOS();
    }

    // Remove or Decrement Item
    function removeFromTicket(id) {
      const existing = ticket.find(i => i.id === id);
      if (existing.qty > 1) {
        existing.qty--;
      } else {
        ticket = ticket.filter(i => i.id !== id);
      }
      updatePOS();
    }

    // Calculate Financials & Refresh UI
    function updatePOS() {
      // Render Current Ticket Items
      const list = document.getElementById('ticket-items');
      if (ticket.length === 0) {
        list.innerHTML = `<div class="h-full flex items-center justify-center text-stone-400 text-sm italic">Ticket is empty</div>`;
      } else {
        list.innerHTML = ticket.map(item => `
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center bg-stone-50 p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-stone-200 animate-fadeIn">
            <div>
              <div class="font-bold text-sm text-stone-900">${item.name}</div>
              <div class="text-xs text-stone-500 font-mono">$${item.price.toFixed(2)} x ${item.qty}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
              <span class="font-mono font-bold text-sm text-stone-900">$${(item.price * item.qty).toFixed(2)}</span>
              <button onclick="removeFromTicket(${item.id})" class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-stone-200 text-stone-600 text-xs font-bold flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-red-100 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors">&times;</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `).join('');
      }

      // Calculations
      const sub = ticket.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.qty), 0);
      const taxAmount = sub * 0.12;
      const totalAmount = sub + taxAmount;

      // Update DOM Text
      document.getElementById('subtotal').innerText = `$${sub.toFixed(2)}`;
      document.getElementById('tax').innerText = `$${taxAmount.toFixed(2)}`;
      document.getElementById('total').innerText = `$${totalAmount.toFixed(2)}`;
    }

    function clearTicket() {
      ticket = [];
      updatePOS();
    }

    function checkout() {
      if (ticket.length === 0) return alert('Cannot process empty ticket.');
      
      alert(`🎉 Sale Successful!\nOrder #${String(orderCounter).padStart(4, '0')} has been logged.`);
      orderCounter++;
      document.getElementById('ticket-number').innerText = `#${String(orderCounter).padStart(4, '0')}`;
      clearTicket();
    }

    // Set Live Clock
    setInterval(() => {
      document.getElementById('live-clock').innerText = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();
    }, 1000);

    // Initial Setup Run
    renderMenu(MENU);
    updatePOS();
  </script>
</body>
</html>
Use code with caution.
What Features This Vibe Build Includes:
  • Interactive UI Tabs: Switch categories seamlessly between All, Coffee, Tea, and Pastries.
  • Reactive Checkout States: Dynamically updates the bill totals, calculates custom sales tax instantly, and alters state when items are added/removed.
  • Order Number Automation: Validates successful sales and increments ticket values sequentially.
Would you like to focus next on adding custom modifications (like oat milk / extra shots) or hook this up to a local database so your sales data saves permanently?
